welcome.title: Welcome to Imbizo-CS Workbench
welcome.subtitle: Create a project, open an existing Imbizo project folder, or start by importing a transcript file.
welcome.offline_note: Offline ready. Imbizo-CS does not require a cloud account, API key, telemetry service, or network connection for core work.
welcome.project_folder_note: Open Project Folder is for folders that already contain project.sqlite. To open CSV, XML, TXT, ELAN, Praat, Excel, audio, or video files, use Import Data File.
